use_cases: Showcasing product features with auto-cycling carousel animation
Displaying feature highlights with progress indicators for SaaS landing pages
Presenting feature comparisons with smooth scroll navigation
Interactive feature exploration with click-to-select functionality
Rotating feature demonstrations for product marketing sites
ai_summary: An interactive feature showcase component that automatically cycles through product features with animated progress indicators. Features smooth scroll navigation, click-to-select interaction, and hover states. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, product demos, and feature highlights with a minimalist sky-blue accent design.
